All Calculators

Choose the calculator that matches your goal. They all work together — start with TDEE and build from there.

Most Popular

TDEE Calculator

Find out exactly how many calories your body burns each day based on your activity level.

Use calculator

Calorie Deficit Calculator

Calculate the precise calorie deficit you need to lose weight at your desired pace.

Use calculator

Macro Calculator

Get personalized protein, carbohydrate, and fat targets tailored to your goals.

Use calculator

BMR Calculator

Calculate your basal metabolic rate — the calories your body burns at complete rest.

Use calculator

Protein Calculator

Determine your optimal daily protein intake to build muscle or maintain lean mass.

Use calculator

Why CaloricLab?

Built for people who want real answers, not guesswork.

Science-Backed Formulas

All calculators use peer-reviewed equations including Mifflin-St Jeor and Katch-McArdle, the gold standards in sports nutrition.

Completely Free

No account required, no paywalls, no upsells. Just accurate, instant results whenever you need them.

Privacy First

Your measurements stay on your device. We never store personal health data on our servers.

Ready to get started?

Pick a calculator and get your numbers in under two minutes.
